title: Revendor test tooling + Lint fix.
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind failing-test

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

This is a fork of https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4772 which **only** does the `golangci-lint` and tooling revendor.  There's also a small lint fix for a `tar` package.  The intent is to see if not including an OS update (as in #4772) will result in a smoother CI outcome.

#### How to verify it

CI will pass

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

@rhatdan PTAL.  I'm surprised it passed.  If this can be merged, it will simplify the changes in https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4772 to just the image update.
